summary: Frontend i18n testing iteration 8 - Multi-language translation system testing (FR, EN, ES). Language selector and translations working correctly for home page, menu items, Wisdom module, and Cadence module. One error found when clicking Premium-locked features.

ui_bugs.issue: ReferenceError: PREMIUM_FEATURE_NAMES is not defined when clicking on Premium-locked features (Mirror, Meditation, Lunar Rituals)
ui_bugs.details: Error occurs at app/home.tsx line 158:27. The current code uses t(`premium_features.${blockedFeature}`) which is correct, but there may be stale code or build cache causing this error.

action_items: Investigate and fix PREMIUM_FEATURE_NAMES error in home.tsx - rebuild frontend or check for stale code
critical_code_review_comments: i18n system properly implemented with react-i18next
LanguageContext correctly stores and switches languages
Translation files (fr.json, en.json, es.json) have complete translations for all modules
Language selector component uses data-testid for testing
Wisdom module properly uses t() for all UI elements and quotes from translations
Cadence module properly uses t() for rituals, prompts, and UI elements
Mirror module properly uses t() for UI elements including modes (reflect, analyze, question)

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Language switching works, 1 error on Premium modal

context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n system is working correctly. Language selector visible in home page header (🇫🇷 FR / 🇬🇧 EN / 🇪🇸 ES). Menu items translate correctly when switching languages. Onboarding flow required before reaching home page (Guest login -> Mood selection -> Energy level -> Start journey). One error found when clicking Premium-locked features - PREMIUM_FEATURE_NAMES not defined.

Language selector on home page.details: Language selector visible in header showing flag + language code (🇫🇷 FR, 🇬🇧 EN, 🇪🇸 ES). Modal opens on click with three options.

Home page content translation.details: French: Cadence, Sagesse, Miroir, Carnet des Rêves, Rituels Lunaires, Méditation. English: Cadence, Wisdom, Mirror, Dream Journal, Lunar Rituals, Meditation. Spanish: Cadencia, Sabiduría, Espejo, Diario de Sueños, Rituales Lunares, Meditación. Moon phase also translates (Pleine Lune / Full Moon / Luna Llena).

Wisdom module content translation.details: Title: Sagesse/Wisdom/Sabiduría. Subtitle: Citations sacrées universelles/Sacred universal quotes/Citas sagradas universales. Quotes from translation files used when API fails.

Cadence module content translation.details: Spanish verified: Tu ritmo interior (subtitle), Respiración, Gratitud (ritual types). Morning/afternoon/evening greetings translate correctly.

Mirror AI module translation.details: Mirror is Premium-only for guest users. UI translation code is correct (uses t() for title, subtitle, placeholder, modes). Could not test AI response language due to Premium lock.

PREMIUM_FEATURE_NAMES_ERROR.trigger: Clicking on any Premium-locked feature (Mirror, Meditation, Lunar Rituals)
PREMIUM_FEATURE_NAMES_ERROR.suggested_fix: Either define PREMIUM_FEATURE_NAMES constant or ensure the code only uses t(`premium_features.${blockedFeature}`) translation lookup. May need frontend rebuild.
